title: stngularity's tests
description: My resource pack for preliminary tests of new models and textures
body:
Hey! I'm stngularity, developer and designer. But sometimes I make models and textures for my (or my friend's) resource packs. And it's a resource pack for some tests. Almost everything in this resource pack is temporary (for this set only) models/textures. So don't hope that something from the previous version is in the new one.

I recommend to use [PrimLand RP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/primland-rp) instead of this resource pack

# Screenshots of my katana (from [v1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stngularity-tests/version/1))
